title: Sort CLI flags
body: @QiWang19 create this PR: https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/1619 in Podman.  We need to do a similar thing here in Buildah.

comments.body: @rhatdan when you get a chance, can you tweak whatever bits for @QiWang19 here in Buildah that you did in Podman please?  We can't get Git to let us assign the issue to herself.  I've self assigned just to hold it for the moment.
